response:
<<Microsoft AI Ethics Guide>>
Section 1
Microsoft values trust in tech.
Tech needs strong rules.
Rules guide our work.
Work must be safe.
Safe systems help all.
All users need care.
Care guides our path.
Path leads to good.
Good comes from truth.
Truth builds strong trust.
Section 2
AI systems learn fast.
Fast learning needs checks.
Checks stop bad harm.
Harm hurts many people.
People deserve fair treatment.
Treatment must be just.
Just laws guide us.
Us we serve well.
Well served means safe.
Safe tools help life.
Section 3
Data drives modern AI.
AI uses vast data.
Data needs strict care.
Care protects user privacy.
Privacy is key right.
Right to know info.
Info must stay safe.
Safe storage keeps secrets.
Secrets belong to owners.
Owners control their data.
Section 4
Bias hurts many groups.
Groups need fair access.
Access must be equal.
Equal chances for all.
All models need checks.
Checks find hidden flaws.
Flaws cause bad harm.
Harm stops innovation growth.
Growth needs fair design.
Design fixes known issues.
Section 5
Transparency builds user trust.
Trust grows with facts.
Facts show how AI works.
Works are clear now.
Now we explain choices.
Choices are open here.
Here we share logs.
Logs show system steps.
Steps reveal inner logic.
Logic helps people learn.
Section 6
Accountability ensures team duty.
Duty means owning errors.
Errors happen sometimes now.
Now we fix bugs.
Bugs get patched fast.
Fast fixes stop harm.
Harm is never good.
Good teams admit faults.
Faults lead to change.
Change makes systems better.
Section 7
Society needs ethical tools.
Tools shape future life.
Life depends on choices.
Choices shape our world.
World needs safe AI.
AI must serve good.
Good goals guide plans.
Plans help future kids.
Kids learn from tech.
Tech teaches right ways.
Section 8
Collaboration helps solve hard problems.
Problems need many minds.
Minds work together well.
Well done teams win.
Win means safe progress.
Progress helps everyone
